title: He Killed A Kid, Changed Name, Became YouTuber: How 'Ex-Muslim' Saleem Wastik Evaded Police For 20 Years
description: Famous YouTuber and TV panelist Salim Wastik has been arrested by the Delhi Police for kidnapping and murdering a businessman's son 31 years ago in 1995. Notably, Salim had been evading police for 20 years, while maintaining a famous public identity with his controversial views.
